title: EQ - Select a value, disconnect/connect device - the selected value persists
scenario: Verify that the selected EQ value persists after disconnecting and reconnecting the device, for all EQ options (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
steps: 1. Connect the device to the phone.
2. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
3. Disconnect the device from the phone.
4. Reconnect the device to the phone.
5. Check the EQ value displayed on the phone.
6. Repeat steps 1-5 for all possible EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
expected: The previously selected EQ value persists after disconnecting and reconnecting the device, for all EQ values.
